description: Spec landed in docs/architecture.md §9/§10 (bl-d7a5, commit 7ec94d4). Implement change #1 of that fold: REMOVE the `ready` read verb (src/verb.rs enum + dispatch in src/reads.rs) and replace it with a `--status ready|blocked|claimed` filter on `bl list` (space-separated value, not a bespoke --ready boolean). --status filters the derived 3-state ladder src/reads/list.rs already computes (ready/blocked/claimed, §3). `bl list --status ready` == old `bl ready`: live + unclaimed + every claim-blocker resolved (§10), ordered by priority asc (absent last) then created asc. Make that ordering UNIFORM for every `bl list` invocation (the one ordering input drives all listings — ready's order was never special); list.rs::order_key already holds it. COORDINATION: bl-3b1a also edits src/verb.rs / verb-result rendering (+ a '--json shape: shared renderer vs per-class' decision); sequence after it or rebase to avoid a verb.rs clash. Independent of the history-reconstruction ball (change #2/#3).
title: §9 impl: remove the `ready` verb, add `bl list --status ready|blocked|claimed`
